📚【Sayonara Boku no Maid-sama】ist zu Ende gegangen! ✨

📅 Finalband 》12. Juni (Band 1 & 2)
🖊 Story & Art》Tensen Gotō
🏷️ Genre 》Suspense, Drama

#さよなら僕のメイド様 #後藤天泉 #Manga #MangaNews
© Tensen Gotō / KADOKAWA

images.alt:
Der Manga »Sayonara Boku no Maid-sama« von Tensen Gotō ist am 12. Mai 2026 im Magazin »Monthly Comic Beam« von Kadokawa zu Ende gegangen. Die Reihe lief in Japan vom 12. November 2025 bis zum 12. Mai 2026 und umfasst insgesamt 2 Bände, die beide am 12. Juni 2026 in Japan erscheinen. Das Werk ist bislang weder auf Englisch noch auf Deutsch erhältlich.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Für Yuri war das Leben längst zu etwas geworden, das sie nur noch irgendwie überstehen konnte. Sie wollte einfach „normal“ sein, doch zwischen Angst, Selbstzweifeln und dem Schatten ihrer Eltern wusste sie nicht einmal, wie dieses Normal überhaupt aussehen sollte. An ihrer Seite stehen Himeka, die von einer Karriere als Synchronsprecherin träumt und überall Unruhe hinterlässt, sowie Megu, die ihr ganzes Leben einem Idol widmet. Drei junge Frauen suchen nach Halt und geraten dabei immer tiefer in ihre eigenen Abgründe.

images.alt:
Der Manga »Hanī Remon Sōda« von Mayu Murata ist am 3. April 2026 im Magazin »Ribon« von Shueisha zu Ende gegangen. Die Reihe lief in Japan vom 28. Dezember 2015 bis zum 3. April 2026 und umfasst insgesamt 31 Bände (124 Kapitel). Der 31. Band, der zugleich den Abschluss der Reihe bildet, erscheint am 25. Mai 2026 in Japan. Yen Press veröffentlicht die Reihe auf Englisch, während sie hierzulande bei TOKYOPOP auf Deutsch erhältlich ist.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Die Mittelschulzeit hat für Uka Ishimori tiefe Spuren hinterlassen. Nach Jahren voller Schmerz hat sie fast vergessen, wie man lächelt, weint oder auch nur ein einfaches „Hallo“ über die Lippen bringt. Erst als sie einem Jungen mit zitronengelbem Haar wiederbegegnet, beginnt sich etwas in ihr zu verändern. Zum ersten Mal wächst in ihr die Hoffnung, dass ihr Leben leichter werden könnte, wenn sie den Mut findet, sich anderen zu öffnen.

images.alt:
Der Manga »1-nen A-gumi no Monster« von Hideki ist am 27. März 2026 im Magazin »Monthly Comic REX« von Ichijinsha zu Ende gegangen. Die Reihe lief in Japan vom 27. Januar 2018 bis zum 27. März 2026 und umfasst insgesamt 16 Bände (94 Kapitel). Der 16. Band, der zugleich den Abschluss der Reihe bildet, erscheint am 27. Mai 2026 in Japan. Das Werk ist bislang weder auf Englisch noch auf Deutsch erhältlich.

📜 Beschreibung 》
An einer renommierten Mädchenschule soll die nächste Generation eleganter und kluger junger Damen ausgebildet werden. Doch in Klasse 1-A herrscht ein anderes Gesetz: Wer dort unterrichtet, hält meist keine Woche durch. Lehrer kündigen, fliehen oder geraten selbst in Schwierigkeiten, während die Schülerinnen ihren Ruf als „Klasse der Monster“ immer weiter festigen. Als der unauffällige Jimi Tarou vor ihnen steht, beginnt ein gefährliches Kräftemessen zwischen einem neuen Lehrer und der berüchtigtsten Klasse der Schule.

Cost transparency should be a default AI feature.

If you can see spend while you work, it gets easier to choose the right model, avoid overkill, and stop stacking subscriptions just in case.

Magicdoor starts at /month, includes  in credits, and typical users land around -10/month total.

Image AI is where subscription stacking gets silly.

You generate in one app, edit in another, remove backgrounds somewhere else, then pay again to upscale.

A better setup is one workflow with 9 image models, editing tools, and upscaling from /bin/zsh.006 when you actually need it.

record.text: Graph-based semantic memory is a fascinating area for AI agents. For teams tackling persistent AI memory challenges, Kumbukum provides a practical solution to maintain long-term context and recall. This video shows how it works: https://youtu.be/DnNchFuE1Do?si=TqcWHLPm9I1SQqaf

That's a great point about fact extraction for AI notes. Persistent AI memory, like Kumbukum, really helps here by providing long-term context and recall to ensure accuracy and reduce redundant info. It makes a big difference for documentation.

Human context memory limits are real. AI's vastness for info recall is a game-changer. That's why building persistent 'second brain' for AI is key. Kumbukum helps personal AIs remember and build on interactions without context window limits.

【美国观察：SpaceX 计划启动史上最大规模 IPO】

据 FT 报道，SpaceX 已开始筹备公开上市。此次 IPO 若成功，可能成为美国历史上规模最大的首次公开募股。

分析：这不仅是 Musk 的资本动作，更是商业航天进入“大规模资本化”阶段的标志。SpaceX 的估值将直接影响对卫星互联网（Starlink）和深空探索的资源投入。

影响：将引发市场对商业航天板块的重新估值，并可能带动相关供应链公司的股价。

后续：关注具体上市时间表及披露的财务细节，特别是 Starlink 的盈利能力。

images.alt:
And of course with most trends, there's a backlash to people calling out AI. One defender called the popular groundswell against AI slop "the new McCarthyism." Some of these posts about AI policing are imbued with a sense of outright betrayal.
How dare you draw attention to an unethical shortcut that we all use, even if some of us are better at using it than others.
How dare you let people see your writing is actually just two LLMs in a trench coat.
Again they're not mad that people use it: they're mad that people are catching on.

But while I took mental notes on what I was observing, I also felt a lack of representation for true, profound, and guttural loathing of AI. The people like me who have only the vaguest idea of what defines AI, but extremely specific examples of why it sucks.
I'm not a hater based on vibes. I'm a hater based on facts. And those facts deserve as much respect as the billionaires who continue to dump money into losing enterprises.

external.description:
*   *


太空探索技術公司 SpaceX 於週三（20 日）正式向美國證券交易委員會（SEC）提交招股說明書，計畫以股票代碼「SPCX」於那斯達克（Nasdaq）交易所上市，預計 6 月正式掛牌。這場由高盛領銜主辦的募資案將創下歷史紀錄，並讓執行長馬斯克（Elon Musk）同時掌管兩家市值破兆美元的上市公司。

招股書內容揭露了SpaceX龐大的市場野心，並首次公開星鏈（Starlink）驚人的獲利能力、AI 業務的營收與資本支出。

CNBC、Yahoo Finance等外電報導，根據招股書數據，SpaceX在2026年第一季的總營收年增15%至46.9億美元。在公司劃分的「太空」（Space）、「網路連接」（Connectivity）與「AI」三大業務中，包含Starlink衛星網路服務在內的網路連接業務，已成為公司的營收與獲利支柱。

根據說明書，Starlink第一季創造了32.6億美元的營收，占公司總營收的69%。目前全球Starlink訂戶數已達到約1,030萬戶。

網路連接業務也是全公司唯一賺錢的部門，Q1營益來到11.9億美元。相較之下，太空部門Q1營損為6.19億美元，AI部門則虧損25億美元。整體Q1營損為42.8億美元。

SpaceX預估，Starlink潛在市場規模巨大，其中寬頻業務市場達8,700億美元，行動通訊市場達7,400億美元。

### AI資本支出與研發成本跳增

SpaceX近期併購了馬斯克的AI新創公司xAI，這讓AI基礎設施成為公司的巨額開銷來源。數據顯示，SpaceX Q1的資本支出年增一倍以上至101億美元，其中絕大部分（高達77億美元）都投入AI領域，其餘則花在太空與網路連接業務。

AI部門的財務壓力主要來自基礎設施與雲端運算。2025年AI部門的營收成本跳增29%至21.8億美元。AI研發成本暴增超過300%至50.6億美元，其中包含16.7億美元的GPU折舊費用，以及14.4億美元的基礎設施與雲端開銷。

公司目前擁有254.5億美元的合約承諾（包含雲端算力），其中95%的款項集中在2026年與2027年支付。

不過，AI 算力也帶來了龐大收益。招股書透露，AI新創商Anthropic承諾至2029年5月為止，每月向SpaceX支付12.5億美元，以使用其Colossus 1資料中心的全部算力。

（首圖來源：shutterstock）

Make no mistake, this is Elon Musk’s company. Per the filing, Musk will be the CEO, CTO, and chairman of the SpaceX board after the IPO.

The S-1 shows he owns 93.6% of SpaceX’s Class B stock, which comes with 10 votes per share. Musk is therefore currently sitting on 85.1% of the voting power at SpaceX. That number is expected to drop following the IPO but will stay above 50%, allowing SpaceX to dodge certain rules about having independent directors on its board.

This feature introduces advanced governance controls that allow administrators to configure security and compliance settings at the environment or environment group level within the Power Platform admin center.

These controls work by configuring new settings for agent sharing, turning off anonymous access endpoints, and enforcing the use of approved authentication providers through integrated identity management. The system applies these configurations through environment-level policies that are validated during agent deployment and runtime, ensuring consistent enforcement across all environments.

**What action do I need to take?**
This message is for awareness, and no action is required.

If you would like more information on this feature, please visit Manage agent security with enhanced admin controls.

record.text: Microsoft Teams is updating meeting controls and the share panel to simplify use, reduce accidental clicks, and improve sharing confidence. Changes include center-aligned controls, customizable layouts, a redesigned share panel with live previews, and a two-step share confirmation. Rollout begins...

external.description:
🚨

**Major Update:** This post contains a significant change that may impact your organisation.

**[What and Why]**

As Microsoft Teams has added meeting capabilities over time, the meeting controls and share panel have grown crowded, contributing to mis-clicks between high‑impact actions like Share, Leave, and Raise hand, and to accidental shares of unintended content. Drawing on extensive customer feedback and telemetry, we’re introducing two coordinated updates: **simplified meeting controls** and a **redesigned share panel**. Together, they make core actions easier to find, reduce accidental clicks, and give users more confidence when sharing content.

This update supports **personal and team productivity** by reducing friction in everyday meetings and improving confidence when presenting or sharing content.

This message is associated with Microsoft 365 Roadmap ID 560321 and 502520. It applies to Teams for Windows desktop, Teams for Mac desktop, and Teams for the web.

**[Rollout Schedule]**

  * Targeted Release: We will begin rolling out in **early July 2026** and expect to complete by **late June 2026**.
  * General Availability (Worldwide): We will begin rolling out in **early August 2026** and expect to complete by **late August 2026**.
  * General Availability (GCC, GCC High): We will begin rolling out in **early September 2026** and expect to complete by **late October 2026**.
  * General Availability (DoD): We will begin rolling out in **early October 2026** and expect to complete by **late November 2026**.



**[Impact on Your Organization]**

**Who is affected:**

  * All Teams work and school users joining meetings



**Platforms:**

  * Teams for Windows desktop
  * Teams for Mac desktop
  * Teams for the web
  * Not in scope: Teams (consumer), iOS, Android, Teams Rooms, Linux



**What will happen:**

  * Meeting controls will be center‑aligned, with microphone, camera, and share grouped together.
  * The Leave button will be separated to reduce accidental exits.
  * Less‑used actions will move into a reorganized More menu.
  * **Users can personalize meeting controls** by pinning, unpinning, and rearranging controls using drag and drop.
  * The redesigned share panel will include:
    * Live previews of screens and windows.
    * A tabbed layout (Screens & Apps, Interactive Files, More options).
    * A **two‑step share confirmation** to reduce accidental sharing.
  * The new experience is **enabled by default** and cannot be disabled at the tenant level.
  * During rollout, users may opt in early and can temporarily return to the previous experience from Teams settings.
  * Existing meeting app pinning policies will continue to be honored.
  * New meeting app pinning policies will support up to two apps pinned to the main meeting controls, with additional apps available in the More menu.



**Known limitations:**

  * Meeting controls customization preferences (such as pinned controls) do not sync across devices at launch. Preferences persist across meetings on the same client. Cross‑device sync is planned for a future release.
  * The opt‑out toggle for the new meeting experience is controlled by individual users and cannot be managed at the tenant level. This opt‑out is a temporary adoption aid and will be retired in a future release. Microsoft will provide advance notice via a separate Message Center post before removal.



**[Action Required / Recommendations]**

No immediate action is required.

We recommend that you:

  * Review existing Teams meeting app pinning policies and plan future policies around the two‑app limit.
  * Communicate this change to users, helpdesk, and internal support teams ahead of the June 2026 rollout. Detailed change management guidance for Champions and IT Pros/admins, along with user training resources, will be published in early May 2026 on adoption.microsoft.com.
  * Update internal documentation and training materials to reflect:
    * The new meeting controls layout.
    * User customization options.
    * The updated share panel experience.



**[Compliance Considerations]**

No compliance considerations identified, review as appropriate for your organization.
external.title: MC1317197: Microsoft Teams: A refreshed in-meeting experience with simpler controls and a smarter share panel

How does this affect me?
This feature enables automatic clearing of bridge transactions […]

external.description:
We are announcing the ability to automatically clear centralized bridged vendor payments during bank reconciliation in Dynamics 365 Finance. This feature will reach general availability on June 5, 2026.

**How does this affect me?**
This feature enables automatic clearing of bridge transactions generated by centralized vendor payments when bank statements are matched with records in Dynamics 365 Finance during the bank reconciliation process. The system posts the required clearing journals in the centralized legal entity, ensuring that general ledger balances are updated accurately.

**What action do I need to take?**
This message is for awareness, and no action is required.

If you would like more information on this feature, please visit Automatic clearing of centralized bridged vendor payments during bank reconciliation.
